# Create an `epic-create` skill â€” epic bodies = problem-scope + intended-solution, not pseudo-subs/ACs

**Friction (surfaced by @tobiu, 2026-06-03).** There is an `epic-review` skill (entry) + an `epic-resolution` skill (exit), but **no `epic-create` skill** â€” the creation-side dual of `ticket-create`. Result: agents **bombard epic bodies with pseudo-subs + ACs** instead of describing the **problem scope + intended solution**.

## Empirical anchor

My own **#12440 + #12442** epics this session baked full AC lists + a sub-decomposition *into the epic body*, then created the subs separately. That is the antipattern â€” the body duplicates (and will out-stale) the linked subs.

## The rule the skill must codify

- An epic body = **problem scope + intended solution** (+ the Â§6.6 graduation Signal Ledger when graduated from a Discussion).
- **ACs live in the SUB tickets, not the epic body.**
- Subs are **linked via `update_issue_relationship`** (parent-child) and **added incrementally at any time**.
- **The epic body MUST NOT hardcode sub-lists / sub-content** â€” it goes stale as subs are added/changed â†’ **FAIL**. The live sub-set is the linked relationship, not body prose.

## Scope

A new `.agents/skills/epic-create/` skill (sibling to `ticket-create`, `epic-review`, `epic-resolution`), authored per the `create-skill` Progressive-Disclosure discipline (Map/SKILL.md router + references payload; net-byte conscious).

## Related

- **#11370** â€” codify optional ADR emission at Ideation Sandbox graduation (adjacent: the Discussion â†’ epic + ADR path).
- `epic-review` / `epic-resolution` â€” the existing entry/exit duals this completes.
- Surfaced during the **#12453** AiConfig-SSOT effort (whose epic, when filed post-graduation, should follow this skill).

Origin: @tobiu-surfaced, session `e886ae3e`.

Incorporate @neo-claude-opus's frictionâ†’gold input: each sub MUST be a one-PR-deliverable leaf that cleanly Resolves (the #12367 lint-pr-body contract); the epic is the Refs'd umbrella, never a PR close-target (epic-auto-close-with-open-subs hazard); multi-cause symptoms = one leaf per cause. Prevents the mid-review leaf-splitting churn seen on #12470/#12472.

Refs #12454"

**Contract Ledger (on the ticket, per the Contract-Completeness gate).** A new SKILL is an agent-consumed governance surface, so the T3 matrix lives on the ticket + in PR #12476's body. Surface-Anchor V-B-A'd. *(Updated: added the `ticket-create-workflow.md Â§5` carve-out row per @neo-gpt's review-followup, so this ledger matches the PR-body ledger + the diff's consumed surfaces.)*

| `ticket-create-workflow.md Â§5` (AC mandate) | @neo-gpt #12476 integration finding | Adds an **epic carve-out**: for `epic`-labeled tickets, ACs live in the SUB tickets (not the epic body) â†’ author per `epic-create`. Resolves the *ticket-create-mandates-ACs* vs *epic-create-forbids-ACs* contradiction | Additive one-sentence carve-out; non-epic tickets unchanged | Yes | `lint-skill-manifest` OK; under 25000 budget |

- 2026-06-04T08:23:27Z @tobiu referenced in commit `5e0cea1` - "feat(agentos): add epic-create skill â€” epic bodies = problem-scope + intended-solution (#12476)

* feat(agentos): add epic-create skill â€” epic bodies = problem-scope + intended-solution (#12454)

New .agents/skills/epic-create/ (creation-side dual of ticket-create; entry partner of epic-review/epic-resolution). Codifies: epic body = problem-scope + intended-solution; ACs live in SUB tickets; subs LINKED via update_issue_relationship + added incrementally; body MUST NOT hardcode a sub-list (stales out â†’ FAIL). SKILL router + references payload + manifest entry + claude symlink + skill-catalog rows.

Resolves #12454

* feat(agentos): bake leaf-sub close-target contract into epic-create (#12454)

Incorporate @neo-claude-opus's frictionâ†’gold input: each sub MUST be a one-PR-deliverable leaf that cleanly Resolves (the #12367 lint-pr-body contract); the epic is the Refs'd umbrella, never a PR close-target (epic-auto-close-with-open-subs hazard); multi-cause symptoms = one leaf per cause. Prevents the mid-review leaf-splitting churn seen on #12470/#12472.

Refs #12454

* docs(skills): epic carve-out in ticket-create AC mandate â€” compose with epic-create (#12454)

Resolve the cross-skill contradiction @neo-gpt flagged on PR #12476: ticket-create Â§5 mandated ACs for every ticket body, but epic-create forbids ACs in epic bodies. Add a narrow epic carve-out at the AC bullet pointing to epic-create (epic body = problem-scope + intended-solution; ACs in subs; subs linked + leaf-sized). The two creation-side skills now compose.

Refs #12454
